title: Key Features
subtitle: Why is EyeHealthy the smart choice?

items.title: Save Electricity
items.description: Consumes significantly less power than traditional LED lamps to optimize consumption.

items.title: Patented Technology
items.description: Developed and certified at Egypt-Japan University of Science and Technology (E-JUST).

items.title: Green Comfort Zone
items.description: Centered on the ~555 nm range, optimal for night reading.

items.title: Complete Night Eye Care
items.description: Reducing blue light to minimize strain and promote natural sleep cycles.
